info.name: PayoneX Api - Online Payment Service
info.description: We are a Payment Gateway service provider. If you want to connect your payments. We are ready to serve you with full efficiency. You can read the Document here for connection. Accept our system

item.name: Authenication

request.description:
First method need to get token to use for another method you can get accessKey and secretKey from your admin portal and the key expired you can use in 24 hour.

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| accessKey | string | key generate in back office |
| secretKey | string | key generate in back office |

item.description: #### **Before you connect to our API, you need to config ip whitelist and generate accesskey secretkey to connect with us.**

request.description:
This is the part of managing your customer accounts. Before you make a deposit/withdrawal with Payonex, you need to create a Customer account on our system before financial transactions can be made. on our system

To create customer information to PAYONEX platform that we will use customer uuid as a reference for another functions related to that customer

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| name | string | Customer's account name |
| bankCode | string | Customer's bank (see bank codes below) |
| accountNo | string | Customer's account number |

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: No authorization or invalid input or failed condition

Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
To create customer information to PAYONEX platform that we will use customer uuid as a reference for another functions related to that customer

| Field | Type | **Value** | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| status | string | SUCCESS | For customers will be able to deposit - withdraw easily. |
|  |  | BLOCK | For customers, deposits and withdrawals cannot be made. |

request.description:
Update maximum withdraw and minimum deposit amount

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| minDeposit | number | the system want config more than 20 - 1000000 |
| maxWithdraw | number | the system want config more than 100 - 1000000 |

request.description: Use this method to approved(SUCCESS) or rejected(REJECTED) transaction that has status ON_HOLD, approved will add credit balance to merchant and fee calculated, rejected will go to refund process

request.description:
Use this method when customer want to deposit money, this will return payment link and qr code text, merchant can either redirect customer to generated link or using qr code data response to show qr on merchant website

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| referenceId | string | Field referenceId We recommend you always submit it. You can use it to map your data. |
| note | string | Field Note is used to save text. |
| remark | string | Field remark is used to save text. |

Callback Example

``` json
{
"uuid":"xxx",
"channelName":"channel xx",
"merchantOrderId":"xxx",
"platformOrderId":"xxx",
"customerUuid":"xxx",
"accountName":"xxxx",
"bankCode":"KBANK",
"accountNo":"12341234",
"amount":100,
"fee":1.6,
"settleAmount":98.4,
"type":"deposit",
"status":"SUCCESS",
"referenceId":""
}

 ```

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: No authorization or invalid input or failed condition

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
Use this method when customer want to withdraw money

| **Field** | **Type** | **Description** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| referenceId | string | Field referenceId We recommend you always submit it. You can use it to map your data. |
| note | string | Field Note is used to save text. |
| remark | string | Field remark is used to save text. |

Callback Example

``` json
{
  "uuid":"xxx",
  "customerUuid": "xxx",
  "channelName":"channel xx",
  "merchantOrderId":"xxx",
  "platformOrderId":"xxx",
  "accountName": "xxx",
  "bankCode": "SCB",
  "accountNo": "12341234",
  "amount": 181,
  "fee": 0,
  "settleAmount": 181.00,
  "type": "withdraw",
  "status": "SUCCESS",
  "referenceId": "xxx"
}

 ```
